statics.name: stringMap
statics.description: The current language's translation map. Never null.

statics.name: alternativeStringMap
statics.description: The default language's translation map, used as fallback. Never null.

statics.name: config
statics.description: The current language's config (name, credits, version, etc).

statics.name: curLanguage
statics.description: The current language ID. Maps to Options.language.

statics.name: isDefaultLanguage
statics.description: True if the current language is the default language.

statics.name: isLanguageLoaded
statics.description: True if any translations are currently loaded.

statics.name: foundLanguages
statics.description: List of found language IDs with names, e.g. 'en/English'.

functions.name: setLanguage
functions.description: Sets the active language and reloads the translation maps. Falls back to default if name is invalid.

functions.name: get
functions.description: Gets a translated string by ID, with optional format params and fallback.

functions.name: translateDiff
functions.description: Translates a difficulty name using the 'diff.' prefix.

functions.name: exists
functions.description: Returns true if a translation exists for the given ID in any loaded map.

functions.name: getRaw
functions.description: Returns the raw IFormatInfo for a translation ID without formatting.

functions.name: raw2Id
functions.description: Converts a display string to a camelCase translation ID. e.g. 'Resume Song' -> 'resumeSong'.

functions.name: isBlacklisted
functions.description: Returns true if the language is in the blacklist.

functions.name: isWhitelisted
functions.description: Returns true if the language is in the whitelist (or whitelist is empty).

functions.name: isAllowed
functions.description: Returns true if the language is whitelisted and not blacklisted.

functions.name: findAllLanguages
functions.description: Scans asset libraries for available languages and populates foundLanguages.

functions.name: loadLanguage
functions.description: Loads and parses all translation XMLs for a given language ID.

functions.name: getLanguageName
functions.description: Returns the display name for a language ID.

functions.name: getLanguageFromName
functions.description: Returns the language ID for a given display name.

functions.name: getConfig
functions.description: Returns the config map for a given language ID.

functions.name: isShowingMissingIds
functions.description: Returns true if the alternative string map has entries, meaning missing IDs will show from the default language.

functions.name: translationsMain
functions.description: Returns the base translations folder path for a language key.

functions.name: translations
functions.description: Returns the full translations path for a key under the current language.
